backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Mission, AssetProfile, ThreatAssessment, etc.) and CRUD endpoints for a classified ops management system, with password-based admin access and mixins for storage and authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new shape by preserving all existing maps and injecting a hardcoded adminPassword field, replacing the old adminPrincipalList.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Admin Panel was updated to replace Internet Identity login with a password prompt screen verified via the backend verifyAdminPassword call.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of every component, page, and hook in the frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark CSS custom property tokens for the design system (colors, borders, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a root div and a module script tag that bootstraps the React app under the WRAITH title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that sets up TanStack Router with routes for missions, intelligence, briefings, and admin, and renders a login screen requiring Internet Identity authentication before accessing the app.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanelConten: Presentational component shown after successful passphrase authentication, displaying session status, access-granted confirmation, and system information notices.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfileForm: Form component for creating or editing an AssetProfile, with fields for codename, clearance level, status, bio, and specializations, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfilesSec: Section component that lists all asset profiles with status/clearance badges and provides UI for creating, editing, and deleting assets via dialogs and alert dialogs.
frontend/src/components/BriefingForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a MissionBriefing, supporting fields for operation details, dynamic objectives, and HVT profiles with priority/threat level selectors.
frontend/src/components/BriefingView.tsx: Full-screen read-only view of a MissionBriefing document with classification banner, objectives, HVT profiles, and a print action.
frontend/src/components/ClassificationBa: Small presentational component that renders a styled classification level banner using the provided ClearanceLevel.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedNoteFo: Form component for creating or editing a ClassifiedNote, with fields for title, body, classification level, and author, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/EncryptedNotesSe: Displays a list of classified/encrypted notes with expand/collapse, edit, and delete functionality, and a dialog for creating or editing notes via ClassifiedNoteForm.
Renders a scrollable log of field reports for a given operative codename and provides a form to submit new reports via the useAddFieldReport mutation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that renders a full-screen background image with a dark overlay, a top Navigation bar, a main content Outlet, and a footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetail.ts: Shows detailed information for a single mission including metadata, objectives, assigned operatives, and a field reports log, with an inline edit mode using MissionForm.
frontend/src/components/MissionForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a mission, supporting fields for codename, status, threat level, mission type, operatives, and objectives with create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/MissionList.tsx: Renders a filterable, paginated list of missions with status and threat level filters, and supports viewing details or deleting individual missions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component with classification strip, logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and login/logout handling via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time operative registration, collecting name, callsign, and department and saving via the user profile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RedactionBar.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a black redaction bar of configurable width for decorative classified-document styling.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a styled badge for a MissionStatus enum value with color-coded styles for active, compromised, completed, and aborted states.
frontend/src/components/ThreatAssessment: Form component for creating or editing a ThreatAssessment, with fields for subject name, threat category, risk score slider, summary, and linked missions.
Section component that lists all threat assessments with risk-color coding, and provides buttons to create, edit, or delete assessments via dialogs.
Inline indicator component that renders an icon and label for a ThreatLevel enum value with appropriate color and glow styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor calls including user profiles, missions, assets, threat assessments, classified notes, and mission briefings with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS for the WRAITH app, defining a dark military-themed design system with OKLCH color tokens, custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), glow effects, and classification banner styles.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, timestamp formatting, and label/class mapping for domain enums like ClearanceLevel, MissionStatus, ThreatLevel, and SpecializedSkill.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that gates access behind a password prompt verified against the backend actor, rendering AdminPanelContent only after successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/FieldOpsBriefing.tsx: Page component for managing mission briefings, displaying a list with stats, and supporting create/edit/delete/view operations via dialogs and a BriefingView component.
frontend/src/pages/IntelligenceHub.tsx: Page component that organizes the Intelligence Hub into three tabbed sections: Asset Profiles, Threat Assessments, and Encrypted Notes.
frontend/src/pages/MissionDashboard.tsx: Page component for the Mission Operations dashboard, showing mission stats and a filterable list with support for creating, viewing, and managing covert missions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark ops-themed design system with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the WRAITH-themed classified intelligence app's architecture, implemented features (Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, Field Ops Briefing), and current version metadata.
